title: Mesospinidium aurantiacum
taxonomy: Mesospinidium aurantiacum is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. The classification of Mesospinidium aurantiacum includes being in the genus Mesospinidium, which is closely related to other genera within the Apocynaceae family. Within the genus Mesospinidium, Mesospinidium aurantiacum is one of several species that share similar characteristics and growth habits. The exact classification of Mesospinidium aurantiacum may vary depending on the source and current botanical research.
